title: HR Executive (Recruitment / Manufacturing MNC / Tampines)
description:
Job Summary

  • Job Title: HR Executive

  • Type: German MNC

  • Industry: Semiconductor / Electronics

  • Location: Tampines

Main Responsibilities

  • Oversee the entire hiring process, from initial sourcing and screening to the final onboarding of new hires.

  • Design and implement hiring strategies using diverse channels such as job portals, recruitment agencies, and career fairs; this includes organizing recruitment events.

  • Act as the main liaison for recruitment agencies and partner with internal hiring teams, providing interview training and guidance where necessary.

  • Manage the screening, interviewing, and reference-checking processes to present high-quality candidates to managers.

  • Meet strict turnaround targets to ensure operational alignment and maintain rigorous compliance with weekly reporting and government regulations.

  • Conduct exit interviews to gather retention insights and advise on HR policy updates based on market trends.

Requirements

  • Degree or Diploma in HR, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related discipline.

  • 2 years of end-to-end recruitment experience

  • Backgrounds in the semiconductor or manufacturing industries are highly preferred, specifically with mass hiring (non-executive roles).

  • Strong command of Singapore Employment Act and labor regulations. 

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables) is mandatory; SAP knowledge is a distinct advantage.

  • Excellent communication skills, high adaptability to fast-paced environments, and strong project management capabilities to handle volume hiring efficiently.

For interested applicants, kindly send your resume in Word/PDF format to include the following in your resume including:

1. Current Salary

2. Expected Salary

3. Availability

4. Reason for leaving

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted applicants will be notified

By submitting any application or resume to us, you will be deemed to have agreed & consented to us collecting, using, retaining & disclosing your personal information to prospective employers with the services provided by us.

Nguyen Thi Doan | R23116355

RRecruiter Pte. Ltd. | 18C9514

postedCompany.description:
RRecruiter is an international recruitment agency specialized in headhunting for executives, managers and experts. We serve as a strategic partner to our clients, offering a turnkey solution to capture and deliver the top talent needed to complete successful projects by aligning with the unique needs of our clients. Our timely action plan significantly saves client’s time and costs.

Our passion is to deliver outstanding customer service to the companies and candidates that we partner. Developing long term and mutually beneficial relationships is the key to our success.

  • Recruitment Experts in Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Philippines & Indonesia market
  • Dedicated Key Account Personnel to handle client relationship
  • Unique database of candidates
  • Access to leading job boards and CV database
  • Extensive experience in sourcing and selecting for key position

More information: https://rrecruiterint.com/


https://rrecruiter-pte-ltd.breezy.hr/
